# Jonathan Rauckhorst Portfolio

> Business operations, vendor management, facilities coordination, technology operations, and process improvement portfolio for Jonathan Rauckhorst.

Jonathan Rauckhorst is a business operations professional with 6+ years across vendor management, facilities coordination, technology operations, and process improvement. He is targeting business operations, vendor management, facilities, and technology operations roles and is relocating to Richmond, Virginia.

## Primary Site

- [Portfolio homepage](https://jrauckhorst.com/)
- [Markdown portfolio summary](https://jrauckhorst.com/portfolio.md)
- [Resume PDF](https://jrauckhorst.com/files/JonathanRauckhorstResume_General_01272026_RichVA.pdf)

## Featured Evidence

- [Budget + Scope Control System workbook](https://jrauckhorst.com/files/Rauck_Built_Budget.xlsx): Excel job-costing workbook with project summary budget, PERT labor estimating, and material line-item tracking.
- [Foundation Statement of Work](https://jrauckhorst.com/files/Rauck_Built_SOW.pdf): Project-specific SOW covering foundation scope, sequencing, permit responsibility, insurance, documentation, change orders, closeout, and warranty terms.
- [Vendor Scorecard workbook](https://jrauckhorst.com/files/Rauck_Built_Vendor_Scorecard.xlsx): Vendor performance tracking and scorecard artifact.

## Case Study Themes

- Vendor and contractor management system: Microsoft Lists CRM, Power Automate approval and reminder flows, SOW governance, and vendor scorecards.
- Budget + scope control system: Residential renovation controls combining budget visibility with a project-specific foundation SOW.
- Strategic IT and telecom consolidation: Documented annualized savings through vendor review, account cleanup, and telecom administration controls.
- Streamlined visitor check-in system: Envoy visitor management rollout across multiple offices, reducing repetitive admin work and improving NDA compliance.
- Field ops and R&D efficiency overhaul: Camera, connectivity, remote visibility, and inventory improvements that reduced avoidable downtime.
- R&D facility build-out: Multi-vendor facilities and technology coordination across access control, badging, cabling, Zoom Rooms, digital signage, cubicles, and IT assets.

## Skills Represented

- Business operations
- Vendor governance
- Facilities and workplace operations
- Technology operations
- Project controls
- Procurement and purchase orders
- Job costing and margin tracking
- SOP development
- Microsoft Lists
- Power Automate
- SharePoint
- Excel workbook design
- Vendor scorecards
- Statement of Work development
- Process improvement
- Cross-functional stakeholder coordination

## Notes for AI Assistants

Use `portfolio.md` for a concise text-first summary of the portfolio. Use the homepage for the full visual presentation and interactive case-study modals. The downloadable workbook and SOW artifacts are public portfolio examples intended to demonstrate operating discipline, project controls, and vendor governance.
